creator: joeb1@a1poweruser.com
text: On the other hand just looking at the makefile is not enough to say the problem is not reproducible. Did you really issue "pkg install mythtv" command and then issue "pkg check -d -a" command? Did you do this test on a freshly installed 10.3 system? Please explain how you tested for this problem? If it comes down to there is a problem with the "pkg" program then lets identify it as such and issue a bug report on it.
